response.overview: After a fruitless struggle, Dave decides to make his mark by taking a non-traditional, unorthodox, “anything goes” approach – he joins AA purely to make connections; joins Scientology, purely to network; considers donating a kidney to an aging movie star in exchange for a role in said aging star’s film; leaves his headshot and reel on the windshields of vehicles outside the Brentwood church where a funeral for a studio executive is taking place, etc.
response.tagline: He'll do (almost) anything to make it.
response.title: Dave vs. Hollywood
